relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Prayer asks that the Lord's word run and be glorified.
Prayer also asks rescue from harmful opposition.
The trustworthy Lord establishes and guards the community.
Confidence rests in the Lord for their continued obedience.
The Lord directs hearts into Divine love and Messiah endurance.
Disorderly walking is not allowed to define the body.
Paul's team gave an imitable pattern.
They worked so as not to burden the community.
The instruction addresses refusal to participate in shared responsibility.
Some are not working but meddling.
Quiet work restores peace and dignity.
Do not grow weary in doing good.
Correction may require distance for restoration.
The corrected one is not enemy but sibling.
The Lord of peace gives peace in every way.
Paul marks the greeting by his own hand.

contemplative_note: 2 Thessalonians 3 closes with restorative order: shared responsibility, no enemy-making, peace in every way, and grace with all.
